en: or are you just trying to stay warm in front of the refrigerator?
ko: 아니면 그냥 냉장고 앞에서 따뜻하게 있으려는 거야?

en: Ow!
Oh, wow, you're feeling out there.
Oh, wow, your face is catching up with your mouth.
ko: 와, 네 얼굴이 입에 따라잡히고 있어.

en: I went by Dad's office.
He is not your dad. Why don't you torture your new family?
ko: 그는 네 아빠가 아니야. 왜 새로운 가족을 괴롭히지 않아?

en: Hey, just because my mother marries someone else
doesn't mean he's my father.
Actually, Kato, that's exactly what it means.
ko: 사실, 카토, 그게 바로 의미하는 바야.

en: I hope you're not thinking of staying here.
ko: 여기 계속 있을 생각은 하지 않길 바래.

en: I sure want to.
I'm sure you do.
I got a place in Westwood near school.
Shouldn't you go to school on the East Coast?
That's ridiculous.
You're funny.
What's your problem, Beavis?
Hey!
You just got here and already you're playing couch commando?
ko: 여기 막 도착했는데 벌써 소파에서 군대 놀이야?

en: Hey, in some parts of the universe,
maybe not in contempo casual,
but in some parts it's considered cool
to know what's going on in the world.
ko: 세상에서 무슨 일이 일어나고 있는지 아는 게.

en: Thank you, Josh.
I so need lessons from you on how to be cool.
Tell me that part about Kenny G again.
ko: 케니 G에 대한 그 부분 다시 말해줘.

en: Come on, you chuckleheads, get in here.
ko: 이리 와, 너희 바보들, 여기 들어와.

en: Josh, are you still growing?
You look taller than you did at Easter.
Well, I think so.
